examples.title: Compute Average with Correct Casting
examples.description: Demonstrates integer vs. floating-point division and using a cast to get a precise average.
examples.pseudocode:
set sum to 0
add three integer scores to sum
compute average as (double) sum divided by 3
print average

examples.title: Swap Two Integers Using a Temp Variable
examples.description: Shows variable assignment and the use of a temporary variable to swap values.
examples.pseudocode:
store a in temp
assign b to a
assign temp to b
print a and b

examples.title: Convert Total Seconds to h:m:s
examples.description: Illustrates integer division and modulo to break a total into parts using int variables.
examples.pseudocode:
read totalSeconds
hours = totalSeconds / 3600
remainder = totalSeconds % 3600
minutes = remainder / 60
seconds = remainder % 60
print hours, minutes, seconds
